tests.name: test_final_state.py::test_client_final_result_shape
tests.trace:
npm_start_output = CompletedProcess(args=['npm', 'start'], returncode=127, stdout='\n> temporal-subscription-ts@1.0.0 start\n> tsx src/start.ts\n\n', stderr='sh: 1: tsx: not found\n')

    @pytest.fixture(scope="module")
    def client_final_result(npm_start_output: subprocess.CompletedProcess) -> dict:
        """Parse the JSON object printed by the client after the workflow finishes."""
        combined = (npm_start_output.stdout or "") + "\n" + (npm_start_output.stderr or "")
        match = FINAL_RESULT_RE.search(combined)
>       assert match is not None, (
            "Expected stdout/stderr of `npm start` to contain a line in the form "
            "`Final result: <json>`. Got:\n"
            f"stdout=\n{npm_start_output.stdout}\nstderr=\n{npm_start_output.stderr}"
        )
E       AssertionError: Expected stdout/stderr of `npm start` to contain a line in the form `Final result: <json>`. Got:
E         stdout=
E         
E         > temporal-subscription-ts@1.0.0 start
E         > tsx src/start.ts
E         
E         
E         stderr=
E         sh: 1: tsx: not found
E         
E       assert None is not None
